title: anthurium × album
intro: Anthurium × album, also known as the velvet anthurium, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Arum. It is a popular ornamental plant, prized for its long-lasting, heart-shaped flowers in shades of red, pink, and white. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its ability to treat wounds, as it contains antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. Additionally, anthurium × album is used in herbal preparations to boost the immune system and reduce stress, and is often consumed as a tea or used in infusions to promote overall health and well-being.
